title: Master’s College and Seminary - Canada.ca
content:
## Master’s College and Seminary
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Biblical Studies
- Bachelor of Cross-Cultural Studies in Ministry
- Bachelor of Ministry
- Bachelor of Missions
- Bachelor of Religious Education
- Bachelor of Sacred Music
- Bachelor of Theology
- Master of Cross-Cultural Studies in Ministry
- Master of Religious Education
- Master of Theological Studies
- Doctor of Cross-Cultural Studies in Ministry
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
